results.rendered_html:
abhidhāyin (wie eben) adj.
1〉 dass.: karṣūḥ kulyābhidhāyinī  AK. 3,4,224 .
— 2〉 sagend, sprechend: ityabhidhāyini priyatame  AMAR. 23 . ityabhidhāyinā  KATHĀS. 26,205 . yuktavākyābhidhāyinā  R. 5,14,11 . vākyābhidhāyī (vācyā˚?) puruṣaḥ pṛṣṭhamāṃsāda ucyate  TRIK. 3,1,9 . aussagend, lehrend: viruddhārthābhidhāyinaḥ . vedāntāḥ  PRAB. 20,17 .
